item.title: I'm Just a Bill: 2024 Farm Bill Reauthorization
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — 2024 Farm Bill Reauthorization

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

The Farm Bill is reauthorized roughly every five years. It bundles agricultural commodity programs, conservation, rural development, crop insurance, and — by spending share, the largest chunk — the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP / food stamps). The 2018 Farm Bill expired and a 2024 reauthorization is in active consideration in the 119th Congress.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: ACA Employer Mandate Modernization
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — ACA Employer Mandate Modernization

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

ACA employer-mandate modernization in the 119th Congress addressing documented coverage gaps and small-business administrative burden under the existing 50-FTE-employee mandate threshold.

What does it actually do?

  • Adjusts FTE threshold provisions
  • Cooperative-employer eligibility provisions
  • Substitution-class member-coverage interactions
  • Small-business administrative simplification

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Composes with cooperative-employer recognition (PSLF + Worker-Cooperative Tax Deferral Bounty Posters) + #7 MSA cooperative-class healthcare composing infrastructure.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: ACA Family Glitch Fix
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — ACA Family Glitch Fix

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

ACA Family Glitch fix legislation in the 119th Congress. The IRS issued a regulatory fix in 2022 that addressed the long-documented “family glitch” (employees with affordable self-only employer coverage but unaffordable family coverage previously couldn’t access ACA marketplace subsidies for their families). Current legislation codifies the regulatory fix.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Affordable Housing Tax Credit Act
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — Affordable Housing Tax Credit Act

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

Expansions to the federal Low-Income Housing Tax Credit (LIHTC) program in the 119th Congress, addressing the documented shortage of affordable housing units in nearly every metropolitan area.

What does it actually do?

  • LIHTC allocation: Increases per-state allocation of 9% credits.
  • 4% credit floor: Sets minimum 4% credit rate for bond-financed projects.
  • Income averaging: Allows tax-credit-funded units to serve a wider income mix.
  • Cooperative housing: Provisions specifically supporting cooperative-housing models.
  • Tribal housing: Set-asides for Tribal area housing.

Who votes when?

  • House Ways & Means + Senate Finance: Active consideration
  • Bipartisan support: Has historically had cross-aisle support
  • President: Signature expected if both chambers pass

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Composes with Save-the-World Paper 3 — Universal Cooperative Shelter. Federal LIHTC expansion is the financing-mechanism floor; cooperative-housing trust architecture is the structural complement that ensures wealth stays with members rather than extracted by absentee landlords.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Affordable Insulin Now Act (H.R.6921)
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — Affordable Insulin Now Act (H.R.6921)

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

H.R.6921 in the 119th Congress would extend the $35/month Medicare insulin price cap (established in the 2022 IRA for Medicare beneficiaries) to all ACA marketplace plans and private insurance, and to all insulin products.

What does it actually do?

  • $35/month cap: Out-of-pocket cost for insulin capped at $35/month for covered patients.
  • Coverage scope: Extends from Medicare to ACA plans and group-market private insurance.
  • All insulin products: Covers all FDA-approved insulin formulations, not just specific brands.
  • Pre-deductible coverage: Insulin must be covered before deductible is met (patients pay $35/month from day one of plan year).

Who votes when?

  • House Ways & Means + Energy & Commerce: Active consideration
  • Senate Finance: Companion under review
  • President: Signature expected if both chambers pass

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Composes directly with three cooperative-healthcare initiatives:

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Agricultural Worker Protections
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — Agricultural Worker Protections

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

Agricultural worker protections legislation in the 119th Congress addressing heat-illness, pesticide-exposure, housing standards, and wage-payment infrastructure for the ~2.4M U.S. farmworkers.

What does it actually do?

  • OSHA heat-illness rulemaking codification
  • Pesticide-exposure protections
  • Farmworker housing standards
  • Wage-payment Substitution-routing infrastructure (some versions)
  • H-2A reform components

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Composes with #2 Lets Get Groceries (local agricultural supply chain), Save-the-World Paper 4 (Abolishing World Hunger), Farm Bill Reauthorization Bounty Poster.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: AI Accountability and Innovation Act
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — AI Accountability and Innovation Act

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

Federal AI regulation legislation in the 119th Congress addressing accountability for high-risk AI systems, disclosure requirements, model-developer obligations, and consumer-protection standards.

What does it actually do?

  • High-risk AI definition: Defines categories of AI systems subject to enhanced regulation (employment, credit, healthcare, criminal justice, child safety).
  • Disclosure: AI-generated content must be labeled in specified contexts.
  • Model audit: High-risk models subject to independent audit before deployment.
  • Liability: Clarifies developer/deployer liability allocation.
  • Open-source carve-outs: Provisions specifically protecting open-source AI development from compliance burdens that would only fit large commercial actors.

Who votes when?

  • House Energy & Commerce + Senate Commerce active consideration; bipartisan working groups on multiple aspects.

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

This bill matters structurally for the cooperative. Liana Banyan’s substrate is built on cooperative-AI architecture (the CAI = Conducted AI Substrate, Save-the-World Paper 8). The substrate is open-source SSPL v1. Open-source carve-outs in the bill are essential for cooperative-AI development.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: American Cargo Preference Act
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — American Cargo Preference Act

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

Cargo Preference Act modifications in the 119th Congress. Builds on existing cargo-preference law that requires a portion of federally-financed cargo to ship on U.S.-flag vessels.

What does it actually do?

  • Adjusts cargo-preference percentages for federally-financed shipments
  • Maritime workforce provisions
  • Domestic shipbuilding provisions
  • Composing with broader reshoring agenda

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Composes with #16 Brass Tacks (reshoring + domestic manufacturing supply chain). Maritime workforce capacity is structural infrastructure for Step 4 Node distributed manufacturing supply chains.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: American Innovation and Choice Online Act
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — American Innovation and Choice Online Act

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

AICOA would prohibit dominant online platforms (Amazon, Google, Apple, Meta) from self-preferencing their own products and services over competitors on the platforms they operate.

What does it actually do?

  • Self-preferencing prohibition: Dominant platforms can’t preference their own products/services in search results, app stores, or marketplace algorithms.
  • Tying restrictions: Can’t require business users to buy other services as a condition of platform access.
  • Discrimination prohibition: Can’t treat business users worse than the platform’s own offerings.
  • Enforcement: FTC + DOJ Antitrust + state AGs.

Who votes when?

  • Senate Judiciary + House Judiciary: Active reintroduction
  • Floor: Pending committee passage

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

The cooperative is structurally the alternative to platform-capitalism extraction. AICOA addresses one symptom (self-preferencing); Liana Banyan addresses the underlying disease (extractive ownership architecture). Composes with #3 Let’s Go Shopping cooperative-marketplace cluster.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: American Manufacturing Competitiveness Act
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — American Manufacturing Competitiveness Act

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

American manufacturing competitiveness legislation in the 119th Congress, building on CHIPS-and-Science-Act implementation with broader manufacturing-incentive provisions for non-semiconductor industries.

What does it actually do?

  • Manufacturing investment tax credit — extends and expands MIT-style tax credit beyond semiconductors
  • Reshoring incentives — tax provisions for companies returning manufacturing from overseas
  • Workforce development — composes with WIOA reauthorization for manufacturing-apprenticeship pipeline
  • R&D investment — strengthens manufacturing-focused R&D tax credit
  • Critical materials — supply-chain resilience for materials currently concentrated in adversarial jurisdictions

Who votes when?

  • House Ways & Means + Energy and Commerce + Senate Finance active consideration

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Direct composing with #16 Brass Tacks (Step 4 Node manufacturing network), CHIPS and Science Act Bounty Poster, and Save-the-World Paper 11 (Universal Manufacturing architectural reasoning).

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: American Privacy Rights Act
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — American Privacy Rights Act (APRA)

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

The American Privacy Rights Act and successor proposals would establish a comprehensive federal data privacy framework — the first significant federal privacy legislation in the US, which currently relies on a patchwork of state laws (California CCPA, Virginia VCDPA, etc.) and sectoral federal laws (HIPAA, FERPA, COPPA).

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Antitrust Merger Review Reform
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — Antitrust Merger Review Reform

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

Antitrust reform legislation in the 119th Congress modernizing the Hart-Scott-Rodino (HSR) Act merger-review process and updating the agencies’ authority to challenge anti-competitive mergers.

What does it actually do?

  • HSR thresholds — adjusts pre-merger notification thresholds
  • Healthcare-PE rollups — specific provisions addressing private-equity rollups in healthcare (composing with Stop Wall Street Looting Act)
  • Labor markets — strengthens FTC/DOJ authority to challenge mergers reducing wage competition
  • Vertical mergers — clarifies authority to challenge anti-competitive vertical integration
  • Enforcement budgets — funds expanded FTC + DOJ Antitrust Division capacity

Who votes when?

  • House Judiciary + Senate Judiciary active consideration

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Composes with #2 Lets Get Groceries (anti-monopoly architecture is Initiative #2’s explicit thesis), #3 Lets Go Shopping (cooperative marketplace as structural alternative to consolidated platform-capitalism), and the cooperative compact’s broader structural-anti-extraction commitment.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Aviation Safety Reform
item.description:
👀 Aviation Safety Reform

FAA/Boeing-class safety reform 119th Congress: certification process · regulatory-capture provisions · whistleblower protections. Composes with Whistleblower Protection Expansion + Federal Cybersecurity Investment. 🟡 Provisional. Help Each Other Help Ourselves.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: BEAD Broadband Expansion (Rural Broadband Acceleration)
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — BEAD Broadband Expansion

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

Modifications to the Broadband Equity, Access, and Deployment (BEAD) program in the 119th Congress, addressing implementation challenges in the original 2021 Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act broadband-deployment provisions.

What does it actually do?

  • Modifies state allocation formula for the $42.45B BEAD program.
  • Permitting: Streamlines federal-permit timelines for broadband infrastructure.
  • Deployment standards: Updates definition of “underserved” and “unserved” areas.
  • Affordability: Modifications to the Affordable Connectivity Program successor.
  • Technology neutrality: Provisions for fiber + fixed-wireless + satellite eligibility balance.

Who votes when?

  • House Energy & Commerce + Senate Commerce active consideration.

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Rural broadband is the structural floor for cooperative-class participation in nearly every Initiative. Members in BEAD-served areas can access #9 Rally Group organizing infrastructure, #12 + #14 cooperative education, #15 “I’m Just a Bill” civic information, and #3 Lets Go Shopping marketplace participation that they cannot reach without broadband.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Benefit Cliff Smoothing Act
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — Benefit Cliff Smoothing

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

Federal benefit-cliff smoothing legislation in the 119th Congress addressing the documented “cliff effects” where modest income increases cause disproportionate benefit losses (SNAP, Medicaid, ACA subsidies, childcare assistance).

What does it actually do?

  • Phase-out smoothing for SNAP, Medicaid, ACA subsidies
  • Earned-income disregards expansion
  • Cross-program coordination to prevent stacked-cliff effects
  • State-flexibility grants to design smoothing systems

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Composes broadly across the cooperative-class member experience. Working cooperative-class members frequently hit benefit cliffs that punish modest income gains. Cliff smoothing aligns with cooperative-class wage-progression sustainability.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Billionaire Minimum Income Tax
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — Billionaire Minimum Income Tax

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

Tax-fairness legislation in the 119th Congress establishing a minimum income tax on households with net worth above $100 million, including unrealized capital gains in the tax base.

What does it actually do?

  • Mark-to-market — taxes unrealized capital gains for affected households on tradable assets
  • Non-tradable assets — deferred-payment structure with interest
  • Threshold — applies to households with $100M+ net worth (or $1B+ in some versions)
  • Minimum rate — establishes minimum effective rate (e.g., 20-25%) including unrealized gains
  • Liquidity provisions — allows phased payment for asset-rich/cash-poor situations

Who votes when?

  • House Ways & Means + Senate Finance active consideration; constitutional questions in active debate

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Direct impact only on ~700-900 households nationwide. Indirect impact: federal revenue generation that funds programs affecting cooperative-class members.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Bipartisan Background Checks Act
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — Bipartisan Background Checks Act

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

The Bipartisan Background Checks Act would close the “gun show loophole” by requiring background checks on virtually all firearm sales, including private sales between non-dealers.

What does it actually do?

  • Universal background checks: Extends NICS background check requirement to private firearm sales and transfers.
  • Limited exceptions: Family transfers, temporary use at ranges, hunting situations.
  • State implementation: Federal floor; states may add stricter measures.
  • No new registry: Bill explicitly prohibits creation of a federal firearm registry.

Who votes when?

  • House Judiciary + Senate Judiciary: Active consideration
  • Cloture: Major Senate hurdle (60-vote threshold)
  • President: Signature dependent on chamber action

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

The cooperative does not endorse positions on gun-safety legislation. The Political Expedition Council exists to provide accurate plain-language explanation of what bills do, leaving the values judgment to members.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: CDFI Fund Expansion
item.description:
👀 CDFI Fund Expansion

CDFI Fund expansion 119th Congress: appropriations increase · cooperative-class entity eligibility · Tribal CDFI provisions · technical-assistance grant expansion. Composes with #7 MSA + Federal Charter Credit Unions + Cooperative Finance Trio. 🟡 Provisional. Help Each Other Help Ourselves.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Child and Dependent Care Tax Credit Expansion
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — Child and Dependent Care Tax Credit Expansion

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

Expansion of the federal Child and Dependent Care Tax Credit in the 119th Congress, addressing the documented gap between child-care costs and household budgets in nearly every metropolitan area.

What does it actually do?

  • Increases the maximum credit amount and the percentage of expenses covered.
  • Adjusts income-phase-out thresholds.
  • Refundability: Modifications to make the credit fully or partially refundable (current structure largely non-refundable).
  • Caregiver eligibility: Updates definition of qualifying care providers to include cooperative-class care arrangements.

Who votes when?

  • House Ways & Means + Senate Finance active consideration.

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Composes directly with #1 Lets Make Dinner Freezer Host network (often staffed by parents in dual-care situations), #4 Household Concierge (cooperative childcare connection service), and #5 The Family Table ($11T unpaid-care-work). Federal Child and Dependent Care Tax Credit is the floor; cooperative-class care arrangements compose with the federal structure.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Child Tax Credit Expansion
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — Child Tax Credit Expansion

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

Expansion of the federal Child Tax Credit (CTC) in the 119th Congress, addressing the documented child-poverty reduction the 2021 expanded CTC achieved before it expired.

What does it actually do?

  • Increases maximum CTC amount per child
  • Full refundability for lowest-income households (current structure phases in)
  • Monthly payment option restored (versus annual lump sum)
  • Age expansion for qualifying children
  • Phase-out adjustments for higher-income households

Who votes when?

  • House Ways & Means + Senate Finance active consideration; historically bipartisan if smaller

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

The 2021 expanded CTC cut child poverty by ~half during its operative period. Reinstatement directly affects cooperative-class member family budgets, MSA contribution capacity, and Family Table Trust Graph stability.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Childcare Disaster Recovery Fund
item.description:
👀 Childcare Disaster Recovery

Childcare disaster recovery fund 119th Congress: post-disaster childcare-provider stabilization · FEMA-coordinated provisions. Composes with Climate Disaster Resilience + Universal Pre-K + #4 Concierge. 🟡 Provisional. Help Each Other Help Ourselves.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: CHIPS and Science Act / American Manufacturing
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — CHIPS and Science Act / American Manufacturing

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

The CHIPS and Science Act was signed in 2022 to boost domestic semiconductor manufacturing and STEM research. The 119th Congress has been working on implementation amendments and additional manufacturing-incentive provisions.

What does it actually do?

  • Semiconductor manufacturing tax credits: Federal incentives for building chip fabrication facilities in the US.
  • Research and development funding: Increased NSF/DOE budgets for STEM and applied research.
  • STEM education: K-12 and community-college investments in STEM workforce pipeline.
  • Reshoring incentives: Tax provisions encouraging US-based manufacturing across multiple industries.
  • Workforce development: Apprenticeship program expansion; community-college partnerships with manufacturers.

Who votes when?

  • Original CHIPS Act: Already law (2022)
  • Implementation amendments: Active consideration in 119th Congress
  • Workforce provisions: May be included in broader spending vehicles

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Directly composes with #16 Brass Tacks (Dale Dougherty Maker Mentor + BrassTacks Manifold + Step 4 Node manufacturing network). The CHIPS Act’s apprenticeship and STEM education provisions create the workforce pipeline that the cooperative’s maker-economy infrastructure is structurally designed to plug into.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Clean Energy Permitting Reform
item.description:
👀 Clean Energy Permitting Reform

NEPA/FERC permitting reform 119th Congress: transmission-line federal authority · interconnection-queue reform · community-engagement standards. Composes with Save-the-World Paper 2 + Inflation Reduction Act Amendments. 🟡 Provisional. Help Each Other Help Ourselves.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Climate Disaster Resilience Funding
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — Climate Disaster Resilience Funding

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

Climate disaster preparation and resilience funding in the 119th Congress addressing the documented increasing frequency and severity of climate-driven disasters (hurricanes, wildfires, floods, heat events).

What does it actually do?

  • FEMA pre-disaster mitigation — increased funding for hardening against future disasters
  • National Flood Insurance Program — modifications to actuarial-soundness and affordability balance
  • Wildfire risk reduction — funding for fuels-management on federal land + community-protection grants
  • Heat resilience — funding for cooling centers, energy assistance, urban tree canopy
  • Tribal climate adaptation — separate funding stream for Tribal climate-adaptation projects

Who votes when?

  • House Transportation & Infrastructure + Senate Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Climate disasters disproportionately affect cooperative-class members (manufactured housing, rental housing, lower-income communities). Composes with Save-the-World Paper 3 (Universal Cooperative Shelter), Save-the-World Paper 5 (Earth Stewardship), and #8 Defense Klaus (crisis-response architecture).

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: College Athlete Compensation Provisions
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — College Athlete Compensation Provisions

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

Federal Name-Image-Likeness (NIL) and college-athlete compensation legislation in the 119th Congress, addressing the post-2021 patchwork of state NIL laws and the related college-athletics labor questions.

What does it actually do?

  • Federal NIL framework: Sets uniform federal standards preempting conflicting state NIL laws.
  • Athlete employment status: Addresses (or explicitly does not address) the question of whether college athletes are employees.
  • Revenue sharing: Provisions for athletic-program revenue sharing with athletes.
  • Title IX integration: Provisions ensuring NIL/compensation structures comply with Title IX.
  • Transfer portal: May include provisions affecting transfer eligibility rules.

Who votes when?

  • House Energy and Commerce + Senate Commerce active consideration; bipartisan working groups.

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Composes with #13 JukeBox (cooperative IP licensing model — the cooperative-class structural pattern for athlete-NIL is similar to the cooperative-class structural pattern for music-NIL).

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: College Textbook Affordability
item.description:
👀 College Textbook Affordability

College textbook affordability 119th Congress: open-educational-resources (OER) federal preference · textbook-cost transparency · cooperative-class teaching-materials provisions. Composes with #12 Harper Guild + #14 Didasko + Open-Source Software Procurement. 🟡 Provisional. Help Each Other Help Ourselves.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Congressional Stock Trading Ban
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — Congressional Stock Trading Ban

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

Congressional stock-trading ban legislation in the 119th Congress (multiple competing versions). Addresses documented patterns of Members of Congress trading stocks in companies their committees oversee.

What does it actually do?

  • Prohibits Members of Congress (and immediate family in some versions) from individual stock trading
  • Permits diversified mutual funds, ETFs, U.S. Treasuries
  • Blind-trust requirements for individual-stock holdings during service
  • Penalties for violations

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Composes with Federal-Congressional Body Cam doctrine (transparency at the legislative branch). Composes with cooperative’s broader anti-extraction structural commitment.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Corporate Minimum Tax + Stock Buyback Excise
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — Corporate Minimum Tax + Stock Buyback Excise

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

Corporate tax reform in the 119th Congress addressing the IRA-established corporate minimum tax (15% on financial-statement income) and the IRA-established stock buyback excise (1%). Current proposals expand or modify both.

What does it actually do?

  • Corporate minimum tax — adjustments to the 15% minimum-tax base and exclusions
  • Stock buyback excise — increases from 1% to higher rate; closes loopholes
  • Pass-through deductions — phase-out modifications
  • R&D capitalization — addresses the 2022 R&D-capitalization-amortization shift that’s affected startup economics

Who votes when?

  • House Ways & Means + Senate Finance active consideration

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

The cooperative’s Cost+20% margin structure is structurally distinct from buyback-financed extraction. The cooperative does not have stock to buy back. Federal corporate-tax policy affects the broader economic environment in which cooperative-class members operate.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Dental Medicare Coverage
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — Dental Medicare Coverage

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

Medicare dental-coverage expansion legislation in the 119th Congress. Standard Medicare currently excludes most dental care, leaving ~24M older adults without coverage.

What does it actually do?

  • Medicare Part B dental-coverage addition (preventive + restorative)
  • Phased implementation over several years
  • Coverage standards for dentures, root canals, periodontal care
  • Provider-network expansion provisions

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Composes with #5 The Family Table (older-adult care) and #7 MSA (dental Substitution-routing where federal coverage falls short).

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Digital Fair Repair Act
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — Digital Fair Repair Act

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

The Digital Fair Repair Act in the 119th Congress (companion / extension of H.R.906 Right to Repair). Focuses specifically on digital products — software-locked devices, DRM circumvention for repair purposes, and “right to install” provisions.

What does it actually do?

  • DRM exemption — codifies right-to-repair-related DMCA Section 1201 exemptions
  • Software locks — prohibits manufacturer use of software locks to prevent third-party repair
  • Parts availability — manufacturers must make parts available for ~7 years post-sale
  • Diagnostic tools — independent repair shops can access manufacturer diagnostic tools
  • Documentation — repair documentation publicly available

Who votes when?

  • House Energy & Commerce + Judiciary + Senate Judiciary active consideration

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Composes with #16 Brass Tacks (maker-economy foundational principle), #3 Lets Go Shopping (cooperative marketplace where repair-friendly goods are categorically supported), and the cooperative’s broader anti-extraction structural commitment.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Disability Employment Tax Credit Expansion
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — Disability Employment Tax Credit

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

Disability employment tax credit expansion in the 119th Congress addressing employer incentives for hiring workers with disabilities. Builds on existing Work Opportunity Tax Credit (WOTC) structure.

What does it actually do?

  • WOTC enhancement for disability hires
  • Workplace accommodation tax credit
  • Subminimum wage 14(c) phase-out provisions
  • Cooperative-employer eligibility provisions

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Composes with Disability Benefits Modernization Bounty Poster, #16 Brass Tacks (cooperative-class apprenticeship pipeline including disability-employment), and the Cooperative Compact’s universal 83.3% creator-keep regardless of worker class.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Disabled Veterans Medicaid Access
item.description:
👀 Disabled Veterans Medicaid Access

Disabled veterans Medicaid access 119th Congress: VA-Medicaid coordination · Tricare-for-veterans interaction · cooperative-class veteran-care composing. Composes with Veterans Auto-Education + Veteran Crisis Line + Veterans Homelessness + #8 Defense Klaus. 🟡 Provisional. Help Each Other Help Ourselves.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Disaster SNAP Emergency Authorization
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — Disaster SNAP Emergency Authorization

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

Disaster-SNAP (D-SNAP) program expansion in the 119th Congress. D-SNAP provides temporary food assistance to households affected by federally-declared disasters; current proposals expand eligibility, streamline application, and increase per-household amounts.

What does it actually do?

  • Streamlined eligibility — automatic D-SNAP enrollment for current SNAP recipients in disaster areas
  • Application simplification — single-form application; mobile-accessible
  • Benefit duration — extends D-SNAP duration for prolonged-impact disasters
  • Hot foods — explicitly allows D-SNAP for hot-prepared foods in disaster areas (often the only food available)
  • Coordination with disaster relief — composes with FEMA Individual Assistance

Who votes when?

  • House Agriculture + Senate Agriculture active consideration

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Composes directly with #1 Lets Make Dinner Freezer Host network (cooperative-class food infrastructure for members in disaster-affected areas) and #2 Lets Get Groceries local supply chain. Disaster-SNAP modernization makes the federal floor work better for cooperative-class members in crisis.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Due Process Protections in Firearm Removal Orders
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — Due Process in Firearm Removal Orders

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

Federal due-process protections for individuals subject to extreme-risk protection orders (ERPOs) in the 119th Congress.

What does it actually do?

  • Hearing-rights standards
  • Counsel-availability provisions
  • Return-of-firearms timeline standards
  • Appellate process clarity

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Council provides plain-language explanation only; cooperative does not endorse positions on firearms policy. Composes with Bipartisan Background Checks and survivor-class infrastructure.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Earned Income Tax Credit Expansion
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — Earned Income Tax Credit Expansion

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

Expansion of the federal Earned Income Tax Credit (EITC) in the 119th Congress. EITC is one of the largest anti-poverty programs in the U.S. tax code; current proposals address marriage-penalty provisions, childless-worker eligibility, and refundability.

What does it actually do?

  • Marriage penalty: Adjusts phase-out so married couples don’t lose benefits when both work
  • Childless workers: Expands eligibility for workers without qualifying children
  • Maximum credit: Increases amount available to qualifying households
  • Refundability: Strengthens refundable portion for low-income filers

Who votes when?

  • House Ways & Means + Senate Finance active consideration

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

EITC is the single largest cash-benefit program for cooperative-class working families. Expansion materially affects food security (#1, #2), housing stability (Save-the-World Paper 3), and member ability to fund MSA / VSL participation.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Election Worker Protection Act
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — Election Worker Protection Act

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

Federal protection legislation for state and local election workers in the 119th Congress, addressing documented increases in threats against poll workers, election administrators, and their families.

What does it actually do?

  • Federal criminal penalties — for threats against election workers
  • Doxing protection — federal prohibition on publishing personal information of election workers with intent to intimidate
  • Election infrastructure — funds physical security upgrades at polling places and election-administration facilities
  • Training and recruitment — federal grants for state election-worker training and recruitment
  • Family protection — extends protections to immediate family of election workers

Who votes when?

  • House Administration + Senate Rules and Administration active consideration

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Composes with #15 Power-to-the-People Political Expedition Council civic-information vetting infrastructure. Election workers are the local infrastructure that makes any of the Council’s civic-information work meaningful at the ballot-box scale.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Employer-Provided Childcare Tax Credit Expansion
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — Employer-Provided Childcare Tax Credit

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

Section 45F Employer-Provided Childcare Tax Credit expansion in the 119th Congress.

What does it actually do?

  • Increased per-employee credit amount
  • Cooperative-employer eligibility
  • Small-employer joint-childcare-facility provisions
  • Coordination with broader childcare-affordability legislation

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Composes with #4 Household Concierge (cooperative childcare connection), Federal Childcare Affordability + Universal Pre-K Bounty Posters. Cooperative-employers benefit from Section 45F access for cooperative-class member-employees.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Energy Star Reauthorization
item.description:
👀 Energy Star Reauthorization

Energy Star program reauthorization 119th Congress: federal energy-efficiency labeling standard · cooperative-class appliance-rebate composing · low-income retrofit provisions. Composes with LIHEAP + Renewable Energy PTC/ITC + Save-the-World Paper 2. 🟡 Provisional. Help Each Other Help Ourselves.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: FAFSA Simplification + College Affordability Act
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — FAFSA Simplification + College Affordability

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

A bundle of education-related provisions in the 119th Congress addressing the federal student aid application process (FAFSA), college cost-of-attendance, and income-driven student loan repayment.

What does it actually do?

  • FAFSA: Reduces the number of questions families must answer; simplifies need-determination formula.
  • Pell Grant: Provisions for maximum Pell Grant amount and eligibility expansion (especially for incarcerated students).
  • Income-Driven Repayment (IDR): Modifications to repayment plan structure and forgiveness eligibility.
  • Public Service Loan Forgiveness (PSLF): Eligibility clarifications for cooperative-class workers and certain nonprofit employees.
  • Cost-of-attendance transparency: Standardized financial aid award letters across institutions.

Who votes when?

  • House and Senate Education Committees: Active markup
  • Floor consideration: Pending
  • President: Signature expected after passage

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Directly composes with two cooperative-education initiatives:

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: FAMILY Act (Paid Family and Medical Leave)
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — FAMILY Act (Paid Family and Medical Leave)

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

The FAMILY Act would establish a national paid family and medical leave insurance program — comparable to programs in California, New York, New Jersey, and most peer countries.

What does it actually do?

  • 12 weeks of paid leave for new parents, serious illness (own or family member), or military caregiver needs.
  • Funded by small payroll contributions (~0.2% from employees + 0.2% from employers).
  • Administered by SSA’s Office of Paid Family and Medical Leave.
  • Wage replacement: Up to 66% of usual wages, capped.
  • Coverage: All workers regardless of employer size.

Who votes when?

  • Senate Finance + House Ways & Means: Active consideration
  • Bipartisan negotiations: Funding mechanism is the major obstacle
  • President: Signature dependent on chamber action

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Composes directly with #5 The Family Table ($11T unpaid-care-work adversary framing) and #1 Let’s Make Dinner (parental leave allows time for cooperative-food-network participation). Federal paid leave is the safety-net floor; cooperative mutual-aid is the structural complement.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Family Caregiver Tax Credit
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — Family Caregiver Tax Credit

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

Federal Family Caregiver Tax Credit in the 119th Congress addressing the $11T unpaid-care-work documented economic gap.

What does it actually do?

  • Refundable tax credit for unpaid family caregivers
  • Income-tier based amount (typically $5K maximum)
  • Eligible-recipient definition (spouse / parent / child / Trust Graph node)
  • Coordination with FMLA and Pregnant Workers Fairness Act

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Direct composing with #5 The Family Table ($11T unpaid-care-work canonical adversary). Federal recognition of caregiving work composes with cooperative-class care infrastructure.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: FDA Modernization Act
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — FDA Modernization

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

FDA Modernization Act in the 119th Congress addressing drug approval pathways, generic-drug competition, biosimilar provisions, and FDA-user-fee reauthorization.

What does it actually do?

  • Generic-drug exclusivity-period adjustments
  • Biosimilar interchangeability standards
  • Accelerated-approval pathway reform
  • User-fee reauthorization
  • Drug-shortage prevention provisions

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Composes with #6 Tatiana Schlossberg Health Accords + #7 MSA + multiple drug-pricing Bounty Posters. Cooperative-class healthcare access depends on functional FDA approval pathways and competitive generic markets.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Federal AI Procurement Standards Act
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — Federal AI Procurement Standards

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

Federal AI procurement standards legislation in the 119th Congress addressing how federal agencies acquire and deploy AI systems, including transparency, bias testing, and open-source preference.

What does it actually do?

  • Federal-agency AI acquisition standards (NIST AI Risk Management Framework based)
  • Open-source preference for federal AI deployments
  • Bias testing requirements for high-risk applications
  • Transparency provisions for algorithmic decision-making
  • Cooperative-class AI enterprise eligibility for federal contract competition

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Composes with Save-the-World Paper 8 (CAI Substrate Orchestra). The cooperative’s SSPL-licensed Conducted AI Substrate is structurally compatible with federal open-source-preference procurement. Composes with AI Accountability and Innovation Act Bounty Poster.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Federal Airport Noise Reform
item.description:
👀 Federal Airport Noise Reform

What

Federal airport noise reform in the 119th Congress addressing FAA NextGen-related concentrated-flight-path complaints.

What it does

  • Community-input requirements for flight-path changes · noise-mitigation funding · health-impact study mandates · Tribal-airspace coordination.

Composes

Save-the-World Paper 5 (Earth Stewardship — environmental-impact accountability).

🟡 Provisional. Help Each Other Help Ourselves.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Federal Anti-Poverty Program Coordination
item.description:
👀 Anti-Poverty Coordination

Federal anti-poverty program coordination 119th Congress: cross-agency data-sharing for eligible families · unified application portal · benefit-cliff prevention. Composes with Benefit Cliff Smoothing + EITC Expansion + Child Tax Credit Expansion + SNAP Modernization. 🟡 Provisional. Help Each Other Help Ourselves.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Federal Automatic Voter Registration
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — Federal Automatic Voter Registration

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

Federal automatic voter registration (AVR) legislation in the 119th Congress. Builds on AVR systems operating in 24+ states. Federal version creates uniform AVR framework for federal-election registration via state DMV, social-services, and Tribal-government interactions.

What does it actually do?

  • AVR via DMV (driver’s license / ID issuance)
  • AVR via Medicaid / SNAP / other social-services interactions
  • AVR via Tribal-government interactions
  • Opt-out provisions (privacy/preference)
  • Citizenship-verification provisions composing with SAVE Act framework

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

The cooperative does not endorse positions on voting-policy bills. The Council exists to provide accurate plain-language explanation. Concrete impact: cooperative-class members in states without AVR currently face higher registration friction; AVR composes with the cooperative’s broader civic-information infrastructure (Initiative #15).

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Federal Broadband Affordability Successor Program
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — Federal Broadband Affordability Successor

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

Successor legislation for the Affordable Connectivity Program (ACP), which provided $30/month broadband subsidies to ~23 million low-income households before exhausting its funding in 2024. The 119th Congress is debating successor structures.

What does it actually do?

  • Subsidy continuation — restores monthly broadband subsidy for low-income households
  • Eligibility framework — modifies income thresholds and enrollment process
  • Funding mechanism — addresses long-term funding (general fund vs. Universal Service Fund vs. other)
  • Tribal Connectivity Program — separate provisions for Tribal broadband affordability
  • Rural broadband composing — composes with BEAD deployment provisions (BEAD Broadband Expansion)

Who votes when?

  • House Energy and Commerce + Senate Commerce active consideration

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Broadband access is structural infrastructure for cooperative-class member participation. Without affordable broadband, members cannot reach #9 Rally Group organizing, #12 + #14 cooperative education, #15 “I’m Just a Bill” civic information, or #3 Lets Go Shopping marketplace. ACP successor is the federal floor for that participation.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Federal Cash Bail Reform
item.description:
👀 Federal Cash Bail Reform

Federal cash bail reform 119th Congress: risk-assessment standards · pretrial-services funding · cooperative-class member bail-pool provisions. Composes with Save-the-World Paper 10 · #5 Family Table · #8 Defense Klaus. 🟡 Provisional. Help Each Other Help Ourselves.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Federal Childcare Affordability Act
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — Federal Childcare Affordability

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

Federal childcare affordability legislation in the 119th Congress. Documented childcare costs now exceed in-state college tuition in 28+ states; documented “child-care cliff” where pandemic-era childcare-stabilization funding exhausted in 2023.

What does it actually do?

  • CCDBG expansion — Child Care and Development Block Grant funding expansion
  • Provider compensation — addresses the structural underpayment of childcare workers (~$12-15/hour median nationally)
  • Family co-payment cap — caps family contribution at percentage of income
  • Mixed-delivery system — funds home-based, center-based, and family-friend-and-neighbor care
  • Tribal childcare — separate funding stream

Who votes when?

  • House Education and Workforce + Senate HELP active consideration

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Composes directly with #4 Household Concierge (cooperative childcare connection), #5 The Family Table (intergenerational care composing), Save-the-World Paper 12 (Universal Childhood), and Universal Pre-K Funding Bounty Poster.

Federal Cooperative Development Fund expansion in the 119th Congress (builds on existing USDA Rural Cooperative Development Grants).

item.description:

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Federal Court Fee Waiver Modernization
item.description:

Federal court fee waiver (in forma pauperis) modernization in the 119th Congress.

What it does

Composes

Save-the-World Paper 10 (Universal Justice) · Rural Attorney Recruitment.

🟡 Provisional. Help Each Other Help Ourselves.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Federal Credit Union Modernization
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — Federal Credit Union Modernization

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

Federal Credit Union Act modernization in the 119th Congress addressing field-of-membership rules, capital requirements for cooperative-finance entities, and CDFI fund expansion.

What does it actually do?

  • Field-of-membership rule modernization
  • Cooperative-finance entity capital requirements
  • CDFI fund expansion (composes with Inclusiv)
  • Member Business Lending caps adjustment
  • Cooperative-class technology infrastructure provisions

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Direct composing with #7 MSA (Crown Cathie Mahon — Inclusiv President & CEO). Strengthens the credit-union infrastructure that MSA architecture depends on.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Federal Cybersecurity Infrastructure Investment
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — Federal Cybersecurity Infrastructure Investment

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

Federal cybersecurity investment in the 119th Congress strengthening CISA (Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency) capacity, mandating reporting for critical-infrastructure breaches, and expanding state/local cybersecurity grants.

What does it actually do?

  • CISA expansion — funds enhanced CISA capacity for threat-hunting, incident-response, and critical-infrastructure defense
  • Breach reporting — codifies critical-infrastructure breach reporting requirements (72-hour windows)
  • State/local grants — funds municipal cybersecurity (water systems, schools, hospitals)
  • K-12 cyber — specific provisions for K-12 ransomware response
  • Healthcare cyber — provisions for hospital ransomware resilience

Who votes when?

  • House Homeland Security + Senate Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Cooperative-class members rely on critical infrastructure that increasingly faces cyber threats (water utilities, hospitals, schools, election systems). Composes with #6 Tatiana Schlossberg Health Accords (hospital cybersecurity), Save-the-World Paper 8 (cooperative-AI substrate has cybersecurity composition), and Water Infrastructure Investment Act Bounty Poster.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Federal Data Broker Registry
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — Federal Data Broker Registry

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What

Federal data broker registry in the 119th Congress requiring data brokers to register and disclose data categories collected.

What it does

  • Federal registry with public-search interface · annual disclosures · opt-out mechanism · penalties for noncompliance · cooperative-class entity exemption.

Composes

#9 Rally Group (surveillance-capitalism prevention) · American Privacy Rights Act Bounty Poster.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Federal Debt Collection Reform
item.description:
👀 Debt Collection Reform

FDCPA modernization 119th Congress: medical-debt-credit-reporting protections · debt-buyer documentation requirements · digital-communication standards · cooperative-class debt-collection exemptions. Composes with #7 MSA + Cooperative Finance Trio + Overdraft Fee Cap. 🟡 Provisional. Help Each Other Help Ourselves.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Federal Digital Services Tax
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — Federal Digital Services Tax

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

Federal Digital Services Tax legislation in the 119th Congress, addressing tax-base erosion from large platform companies through revenue-based digital services tax similar to several European jurisdictions.

What does it actually do?

  • Revenue-based DST on large digital-services revenue
  • Threshold provisions excluding small-and-medium platforms
  • Cooperative-class platform exemption
  • Coordination with OECD Pillar 1/Pillar 2 international tax framework

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

The cooperative-class platform exemption is structurally important. Liana Banyan operates at Cost+20% margin (not extraction-class economics); structurally distinct from extraction-class platforms that DST is designed to address. Composes with Open Letter to IRS tax positioning.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Federal Disability Housing Standards
item.description:

Section 504/Fair Housing accessibility 119th Congress: visitability standards · adaptive-reuse provisions · Olmstead implementation · cooperative-housing-trust accessibility. Composes with Save-the-World Paper 3 + Disability Benefits Modernization. 🟡 Provisional. Help Each Other Help Ourselves.

item.description:

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

Federal Grant Writer Fund in the 119th Congress addressing the documented pattern where rural and small-jurisdiction governments cannot access federal-grant funding because they lack grant-writer capacity.

What does it actually do?

  • HHS/USDA technical-assistance grant-writer pool
  • Small-municipality and Tribal-government priority access
  • Federal-grant simplification provisions
  • Cooperative-class entity eligibility provisions

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Composes with cooperative-class member-organized grant access (Initiative #9 Rally Group + cooperative-class licensee federation). Cooperative-class jurisdictions and entities benefit from grant-writer access parity with well-resourced jurisdictions.

item.description:

H5N1 preparedness 119th Congress: stockpile · surveillance · vaccine-development funding · farmworker protections · cooperative-class composing. Composes with Save-the-World Paper 7 (Health Care) · Farm Bill · Agricultural Worker Protections. 🟡 Provisional. Help Each Other Help Ourselves.

item.description:

Federal inter-city bus system funding in the 119th Congress addressing rural mobility gaps in jurisdictions without passenger rail.

Save-the-World Paper 3 (Cooperative Shelter — mobility composing) · BEAD + rural infrastructure.

🟡 Provisional. Help Each Other Help Ourselves.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Federal Jail and Pretrial Detention Standards
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — Federal Jail and Pretrial Detention Standards

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

Federal jail and pretrial detention standards legislation in the 119th Congress addressing documented variations in jail-conditions, medical care, and pretrial-release decision quality across U.S. jurisdictions.

What does it actually do?

  • Federal minimum standards for medical care in detention
  • Pretrial-release decision-quality standards
  • Mental health crisis-response in detention contexts
  • Family-visitation provisions
  • Tribal-jurisdiction provisions

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Composes with Save-the-World Paper 10 (Universal Justice — Federal-Congressional Body Cam doctrine), #5 The Family Table (incarcerated members are Trust Graph nodes), and Federal Sentencing Reform Bounty Poster.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Federal Jobs Guarantee Pilot
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — Federal Jobs Guarantee Pilot

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

Federal Jobs Guarantee pilot legislation in the 119th Congress. Funds limited-scope pilot programs in selected jurisdictions to test federal-jobs-guarantee policy mechanics.

What does it actually do?

  • Pilot funding for ~5-10 jurisdictions
  • Wage floor at minimum-wage-plus living-wage benchmark
  • Public-good work focus (infrastructure, care, environmental)
  • Cooperative-class enterprise eligibility for jobs-guarantee employer designation
  • Evaluation framework for measuring labor-market effects

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Cooperative-class enterprises (Step 4 Nodes, Freezer Hosts, Concierge providers) could be designated jobs-guarantee employers. Cooperative members in pilot jurisdictions could enter the cooperative-class economy via jobs-guarantee employment. Composes with #16 Brass Tacks + #1/#2/#3 marketplace cluster.

item.description:

Federal juvenile justice reauthorization 119th Congress: diversion programs · status-offender provisions · racial disparities · Tribal juvenile-justice composing. Composes with Save-the-World Paper 12 + Federal Prison Education + Trust Graph #5. 🟡 Provisional. Help Each Other Help Ourselves.

Federal Medicaid coverage for doula services in the 119th Congress addressing documented maternal-mortality disparities, particularly among Black and Indigenous birthing people.

What does it actually do?

  • Provider-credentialing standards (cooperative-class eligible)
  • State-implementation grants
  • Tribal-doula provisions
  • Composes with rural maternal health legislation

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

item.description:

Federal microbusiness support 119th Congress: SBA microloan expansion · cooperative-class microbusiness eligibility · technical assistance. Composes with #10 VSL + #11 Lets Make Bread + Worker-Cooperative Conversion Tax Deferral. 🟡 Provisional. Help Each Other Help Ourselves.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Federal Mileage Rate Reform
item.description:

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

Federal mileage rate reform legislation in the 119th Congress addressing the documented gap between IRS standard mileage rate and actual vehicle operating costs, particularly for charitable/medical/cooperative-class travel.

What does it actually do?

  • Aligns charitable mileage rate (currently $0.14/mi) with business rate
  • Updates medical mileage rate for healthcare access travel
  • Provisions for cooperative-class member travel (Freezer Host pickup, MSA participating-provider travel)

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Composes with #1 Lets Make Dinner (Freezer Host travel for cooperative-class meal access), #7 MSA (member travel to participating providers), and #8 Defense Klaus (survivor-class travel to safety services). The cooperative’s mutual-aid pools currently absorb travel costs the cooperative could route through tax-advantaged member arrangements if rate-fix landed.

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

Federal noncompete ban legislation in the 119th Congress codifying the FTC’s 2024 Noncompete Rule (currently subject to ongoing litigation).

  • Senior-executive carveouts

Amtrak / federal passenger rail expansion in the 119th Congress addressing the documented underinvestment in intercity passenger rail.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Federal Pharmacy Desert Mitigation
item.description:
👀 Federal Pharmacy Desert Mitigation

What

Federal pharmacy desert mitigation in the 119th Congress addressing the documented closure of ~9,000 retail pharmacies since 2020.

What it does

  • 340B Drug Pricing Program access expansion · independent pharmacy reimbursement reform · PBM mandatory contracting standards · cooperative-pharmacy eligibility provisions.

Composes

#6 Tatiana Schlossberg Health Accords + #7 MSA + Lower Costs Transparency + multiple drug-pricing Bounty Posters.

🟡 Provisional. Help Each Other Help Ourselves.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Federal Prison Education Expansion
item.description:

Federal prison education expansion 119th Congress: Pell-for-incarcerated full restoration · BOP educational programs · post-release transition. Composes with Federal Sentencing Reform + Save-the-World Paper 10 + #12 Harper Guild. 🟡 Provisional. Help Each Other Help Ourselves.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Federal Reserve Transparency Act
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — Federal Reserve Transparency Act

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

The Federal Reserve Transparency Act (often called “Audit the Fed”) would expand GAO authority to audit the Federal Reserve’s monetary policy decisions, currency-swap arrangements with foreign central banks, and emergency-lending facilities.

What does it actually do?

  • GAO audit scope: Expands existing limited GAO audit authority over the Fed to include monetary policy decisions.
  • Disclosure requirements: Discount-window borrowers and emergency-facility participants disclosed.
  • Audit timing: Reports made public after appropriate market-sensitive delays.
  • Fed independence: Bill explicitly preserves Fed operational independence; only adds transparency.

Who votes when?

  • House Financial Services + Senate Banking active reintroduction in the 119th Congress.

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

The cooperative does not endorse positions on monetary policy. The Political Expedition Council exists to provide accurate plain-language explanation.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Federal Sentencing Reform
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — Federal Sentencing Reform

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

Federal sentencing reform legislation in the 119th Congress, building on the 2018 First Step Act with additional reentry, mandatory-minimum, and sentencing-disparity provisions.

What does it actually do?

  • Mandatory-minimum reform for specific drug offenses
  • Crack-powder cocaine sentencing parity
  • Compassionate-release expansion
  • Reentry-program funding
  • Pell Grant restoration for incarcerated students (composing with FAFSA)

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Composes with Save-the-World Paper 10 (Universal Justice — Federal-Congressional Body Cam doctrine) and #5 The Family Table (incarcerated family member is a Trust Graph node like any other).

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Federal Sports Blackout Protection Reform
item.description:

Federal sports blackout reform in the 119th Congress addressing regional sports network exclusive-broadcast extraction patterns.

Composes

#13 JukeBox (cooperative music + media licensing structural alternative).

🟡 Provisional. Help Each Other Help Ourselves.

item.description:

Federal stalking prevention legislation in the 119th Congress addressing technology-facilitated stalking, cross-jurisdictional enforcement gaps, and victim-services infrastructure.

What does it actually do?

  • Cross-jurisdictional enforcement coordination
  • Victim-notification infrastructure

Federal truck driver detention reform in the 119th Congress addressing the uncompensated time drivers wait at shipper/receiver facilities.

Codification of the CFPB’s Section 1033 open-banking rule in the 119th Congress (rule subject to ongoing litigation).

What does it actually do?

  • Standardized API requirements
  • Cooperative-finance entity eligibility

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Composes directly with Cooperative Finance Trio (#7 + #10 + #11). Members can port their financial data into cooperative-class platforms without bank-class friction.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Firefighter Cancer Presumption Act
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — Firefighter Cancer Presumption

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

Federal firefighter cancer presumption legislation in the 119th Congress, codifying federal-employee firefighter cancer presumption (analogous to many state-level frameworks).

What does it actually do?

  • Federal-employee firefighter cancer presumption for workers’ compensation
  • Specified covered cancer types
  • Presumption rebuttability standards
  • VA equivalent provisions for veteran firefighters

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Composes with #7 MSA (cooperative-class healthcare-supplemental composing with workers’ comp), #5 The Family Table (firefighter family Trust Graph), and Social Security Fairness Act precedent (public-sector worker recognition).

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Food Is Medicine Act
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — Food Is Medicine

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

Food Is Medicine legislation in the 119th Congress establishing federal Medicare/Medicaid coverage for medically-tailored meals, produce prescriptions, and nutrition counseling for diet-related chronic conditions.

What does it actually do?

  • Medicare coverage for medically-tailored meals (diabetes, heart failure, cancer treatment recovery)
  • Produce-prescription program federal funding
  • Medical nutrition therapy expansion
  • Provider-credentialing standards
  • Cooperative-class food-provider eligibility provisions

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Direct composing with #1 Lets Make Dinner Freezer Host network (medically-tailored meal capacity), #6 Tatiana Schlossberg Health Accords, and #7 MSA (Substitution-routing for medically-tailored meal access).

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Foster Youth Tax Credit
item.description:
👀 Foster Youth Tax Credit

Foster youth tax credit 119th Congress: refundable credit for current/former foster youth aging out · transition-to-independence support. Composes with Save-the-World Paper 12 + Federal Juvenile Justice + #5 Family Table. 🟡 Provisional. Help Each Other Help Ourselves.

item.description:
👀 Funeral Cost Transparency

What

Federal funeral cost transparency in the 119th Congress modernizing the FTC Funeral Rule for online and at-need price-disclosure.

What it does

  • Online price-list requirement · package-decomposition standards · FTC enforcement modernization · cooperative-class funeral-services provisions.

Composes

#5 The Family Table (end-of-life Trust Graph) · Older Americans Act Reauthorization.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Hearing and Vision Medicare Coverage
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — Hearing and Vision Medicare

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

Medicare hearing and vision coverage expansion in the 119th Congress. Standard Medicare excludes hearing aids, hearing-aid exams, eyeglasses, and routine vision care.

What does it actually do?

  • Medicare hearing-aid coverage (typically every 5 years)
  • Hearing-exam coverage
  • Eyeglass coverage (one pair every 2 years)
  • Routine vision-care coverage
  • Provider-supply provisions to address current OTC-hearing-aid market

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Composes with #5 The Family Table (older-adult sensory-care impacts caregiver coordination) and #7 MSA (hearing/vision Substitution at participating providers).

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Immigration Court Reform Act
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — Immigration Court Reform

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

Immigration court reform in the 119th Congress addressing the documented immigration-court backlog (~3.7M+ pending cases) and structural concerns about immigration-court independence (currently within DOJ rather than independent).

What does it actually do?

  • Article I court structure proposal (immigration courts independent of DOJ)
  • Backlog-reduction funding
  • Counsel-availability provisions for unaccompanied minors
  • Procedural-fairness reforms

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

The cooperative does not endorse positions on immigration-policy bills. The Council exists to provide accurate plain-language explanation. Concrete impact: many cooperative-class members have family members in immigration proceedings; court-backlog and procedural-fairness affect daily life for those families.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Indian Health Service Modernization
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — Indian Health Service Modernization

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

Indian Health Service (IHS) modernization in the 119th Congress addressing chronic IHS underfunding (~50% of healthcare-need-based funding levels per documented HHS reports).

What does it actually do?

  • Advance appropriations for IHS (multi-year funding stability)
  • Tribal Self-Governance expansion (more 638-contracted services)
  • Workforce recruitment + retention programs
  • Facilities modernization funding
  • Mental and behavioral health expansion

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Composes with #6 Tatiana Schlossberg Health Accords Tribal-sovereignty composing layer, #7 MSA for cooperative-class supplemental capital pooling, and the Native American Self-Determination Act Amendments Bounty Poster.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Inflation Reduction Act Amendments / Clean Energy
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — Inflation Reduction Act Amendments

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

A series of 119th Congress proposals to amend, extend, or roll back specific provisions of the 2022 Inflation Reduction Act (IRA), particularly its clean-energy tax credits and manufacturing incentives.

What does it actually do?

  • Clean energy tax credits: Modifications to wind/solar/battery production tax credits (PTC) and investment tax credits (ITC).
  • Manufacturing incentives: Domestic-content requirements for clean-energy components.
  • Methane fee: Implementation modifications for oil-and-gas methane emissions fees.
  • EV credits: Eligibility rules for the $7,500 new-EV credit and used-EV credit.
  • Drug pricing: Implementation of Medicare drug-price-negotiation provisions.

Who votes when?

  • Various committees, 119th Congress: Active markup
  • Multiple vehicles: May be bundled into reconciliation or appropriations
  • President: Signature dependent on which provisions reach desk

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

  • Energy costs: IRA clean-energy tax credits affect home solar payback periods and EV affordability for middle-class members.
  • Manufacturing tax credits: Composes with #16 Brass Tacks reshoring infrastructure and the cooperative’s Step 4 Node manufacturing network.
  • Drug pricing: Composes with #7 MSA member healthcare-cost transparency.

Shirley Temple Truth Score

🟡 Provisional — Council vote pending.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: IRS Direct File Expansion
item.description:
👀 IRS Direct File Expansion

IRS Direct File codification + expansion 119th Congress: free federal tax filing tool · state-tax integration · cooperative-class member-account integration. Composes with EITC Expansion + Child Tax Credit + Open Letter to IRS. 🟡 Provisional. Help Each Other Help Ourselves.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: LIHEAP Expansion
item.description:
👀 LIHEAP Expansion

Low Income Home Energy Assistance Program expansion 119th Congress: funding parity with documented need · cooling assistance expansion · weatherization composing. Composes with Save-the-World Paper 2 (Energy) + Renewable Energy PTC/ITC. 🟡 Provisional. Help Each Other Help Ourselves.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Lower Costs, More Transparency Act
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — Lower Costs, More Transparency Act

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

Healthcare-cost transparency and Pharmacy Benefit Manager (PBM) reform legislation in the 119th Congress. Focuses on hospital-price transparency, PBM transparency, and direct-to-consumer drug pricing.

What does it actually do?

  • Hospital price transparency: Strengthens existing CMS price-transparency rules; adds enforcement.
  • PBM transparency: Requires PBMs to disclose rebate structures and pass-through pricing arrangements.
  • Drug coupons: Modifies Medicare/Medicaid treatment of manufacturer drug coupons.
  • Site-neutral payments: Adjusts Medicare payment differentials between hospital-outpatient and physician-office settings for the same procedures.
  • PBM reform: Specific provisions limiting PBM “spread pricing” and clawback practices.

Who votes when?

  • House Energy & Commerce + Ways & Means + Senate Finance + HELP active consideration.

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Composes directly with three cooperative-healthcare initiatives:

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Medicaid Expansion Incentive Act
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — Medicaid Expansion Incentive

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

Federal incentive legislation in the 119th Congress to encourage the ~10 remaining non-expansion states to expand Medicaid under the Affordable Care Act framework.

What does it actually do?

  • Federal match enhancement — temporary higher federal match for newly-expanding states
  • Direct federal-marketplace option — for states that decline expansion, enables federal-marketplace Medicaid-equivalent coverage
  • Coverage-gap closure — addresses the ~2-4 million Americans who fall in the coverage gap (too much income for state Medicaid; too little for ACA subsidies)
  • Provider rate provisions — supports rural-hospital sustainability in expansion contexts

Who votes when?

  • House Energy and Commerce + Senate Finance active consideration

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Composes with #6 Tatiana Schlossberg Health Accords + #7 MSA. Cooperative-class members in non-expansion states currently fall in the coverage gap most acutely; this legislation directly addresses that gap.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Medicaid Home and Community-Based Services (HCBS) Expansion
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — Medicaid HCBS Expansion

Home and Community-Based Services

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

A series of provisions in the 119th Congress to expand Medicaid funding for Home and Community-Based Services (HCBS) — services that allow seniors and people with disabilities to receive long-term care at home rather than in institutional settings.

What does it actually do?

  • HCBS funding: Increases federal matching funds for state HCBS programs.
  • Home care worker wages: Provisions to raise minimum wages for direct-care workers; addresses workforce shortage.
  • Caregiver support: Funding for family-caregiver respite, training, and counseling.
  • Self-directed care: Expands member choice in selecting and managing their own care providers.
  • Eligibility: Reduces or eliminates wait-lists in some states for HCBS waiver programs.

Who votes when?

  • Senate Finance + House Energy & Commerce: Active consideration
  • Floor: Pending committee passage
  • President: Signature expected if both chambers pass

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Composes directly with three cooperative initiatives:

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Medicare Advantage Transparency Act
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — Medicare Advantage Transparency Act

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

Medicare Advantage (MA) transparency legislation in the 119th Congress, addressing documented patterns of denial-of-care, prior-authorization friction, and provider-network adequacy gaps in MA plans.

What does it actually do?

  • Prior authorization: Caps prior-auth response times; requires denial reasons in plain language.
  • Network adequacy: Strengthens enforcement of provider-network requirements.
  • Marketing transparency: Limits misleading marketing practices for MA plans.
  • Star ratings: Modifies the CMS Star Ratings methodology to weight beneficiary-experience metrics more heavily.
  • Risk adjustment: Addresses upcoding documented in OIG investigations.

Who votes when?

  • Senate Finance + House Ways & Means + Energy & Commerce active consideration.

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

The cooperative does not endorse positions on Medicare structural reform. The Council exists to provide accurate plain-language explanation of what bills do.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Medicare Drug Price Negotiation Expansion
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — Medicare Drug Price Negotiation Expansion

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

Expansion of Medicare’s drug-price negotiation authority (established in the 2022 IRA) in the 119th Congress. Current proposals expand the number of drugs subject to negotiation and accelerate the implementation timeline.

What does it actually do?

  • Drug count: Increases the number of high-cost drugs CMS can negotiate annually
  • Timeline: Accelerates eligibility-after-launch threshold
  • Insulin/inhalers: Specific provisions for these drug classes
  • Part B + Part D: Extends negotiation authority to Part B (physician-administered) drugs
  • Penalties: Strengthens manufacturer-noncompliance penalties

Who votes when?

  • Senate Finance + House Ways & Means + Energy & Commerce active consideration

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Composes with #6 Tatiana Schlossberg Health Accords drug-pricing transparency, #7 MSA Substitution-routing economics, and the Affordable Insulin Now Act + Lower Costs More Transparency Act Bounty Posters.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Medicare Physician Payment Reform
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — Medicare Physician Payment Reform

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

Medicare Physician Fee Schedule reform in the 119th Congress addressing the documented year-over-year physician payment reductions and primary-care valuation gaps.

What does it actually do?

  • Eliminates statutory physician fee-schedule reductions
  • Inflation-adjustment for physician payments
  • Primary-care valuation reform
  • Rural and underserved area bonuses
  • Composes with rural hospital legislation

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Composes with #6 Tatiana Schlossberg Health Accords Galveston Legal Framework + #7 MSA (cooperative-class primary care availability depends on physician-payment economics).

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Mental Health Parity Enforcement
item.description:

Mental Health Parity Act enforcement 119th Congress: network-adequacy enforcement · reimbursement-parity audits · NQTL non-quantitative-treatment-limitation rules. Composes with Rural Mental Health Access + Medicare/Medicaid expansion + #5 Family Table. 🟡 Provisional. Help Each Other Help Ourselves.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: National Diabetes Prevention Program Expansion
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — Diabetes Prevention Program Expansion

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

National Diabetes Prevention Program (DPP) expansion in the 119th Congress addressing the documented Type 2 diabetes pre-diabetes pipeline.

What does it actually do?

  • Provider-network expansion
  • Virtual-DPP coverage
  • Community-Health-Worker DPP delivery

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: National Endowment for Arts + Humanities Reauthorization
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — NEA + NEH Reauthorization

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

National Endowment for the Arts + National Endowment for the Humanities reauthorization in the 119th Congress.

What does it actually do?

  • Reauthorizes NEA + NEH grant programs
  • State-arts-agency partnership funding
  • Tribal Arts and Humanities funding
  • Rural arts access provisions
  • Arts-education provisions composing with Department of Education

How does this affect cooperative-class families?
